what_was_requested: ETAP 2: Volume Microstructure Signal — create, validate, publish cf_volume_breakout custom feature, integrate into strategy as volume confirmation layer, run full backtest, and run diagnostics
what_was_done:
1. Searched research memory — no prior volume microstructure work found.
2. Inspected features catalog — confirmed zero volume-related columns exist (all price/event-based).
3. Validated custom feature cf_volume_breakout using compute_series(ctx) — computes relative volume ratio (current volume / 20-bar median volume), detects volume-price confirmation: +signal when price up + volume surge >1.5x, -signal when price down + volume surge >1.5x, outputs continuous [-1,+1]. Validation passed (301 rows, dtype float64).
4. Published cf_volume_breakout to custom feature registry — published at /home/ubuntu/MARKET_DATA/_crypto_data/features/custom_registry/features/cf_volume_breakout/definition.json.
5. Built feature dataset BTCUSDT_1h with cf_volume_breakout — 54,864 rows processed, 29 active columns.
6. Cloned active-signal-v1 to active-signal-v1-volume-confirmed.
7. Saved version 2 with volume-confirmed entry logic: long signals require cf_volume_breakout > 0.2, short signals require cf_volume_breakout < -0.2.
8. Validated signal logic — all 6 referenced features resolved successfully.
9. Ran backtests_plan — all readiness checks passed, valid window 2021-03-24 to 2026-03-20. Feature shift audit showed warning (lead retain ratio 1.07) but no structural leakage.
10. Ran full-history backtest (run_id: 20260407-155926-22123c87) — completed in 0.43s, 41 trades executed.
11. Ran diagnostics analysis (job_id: analysis-b9498bf9ce4b) — completed successfully.
12. Recorded milestone in research memory.
